public class Solution { public int minDistance(String word1, String word2) { int m = word1.length(); int n = word2.length(); int[][] dpTable = new int[m + 1][n + 1]; for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) { if (i == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = j; } else if (j == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = i; } else if (word1.charAt(i - 1) == word2.charAt(j - 1)) { dpTable[i][j] = dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]; } else { dpTable[i][j] = Math.min(Math.min(dpTable[i - 1][j], dpTable[i][j - 1]), dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]) + 1; } } } return dpTable[m][n]; } }

public class Solution { public int minDistance(String word1, String word2) { int m = word1.length(); int n = word2.length(); int[][] dpTable = new int[m + 1][n + 1]; for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) { if (i == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = j; } else if (j == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = i; } else if (word1.charAt(i - 1) == word2.charAt(j - 1)) { dpTable[i][j] = dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]; } else { dpTable[i][j] = Math.min(Math.min(dpTable[i - 1][j], dpTable[i][j - 1]), dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]) + 1; } } } return dpTable[m][n]; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int n = t.length(); if (rowCount > n) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (n - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < n) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == n; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int colCount = t.length(); // Renamed from n to colCount if (rowCount > colCount) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (colCount - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < colCount) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == colCount; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .boxed() .collect(Collectors.partitioningBy(num -> num > 0)) .get(false).stream().mapToInt(Integer::intValue) .reduce(0, Integer::max); } }
